column1: Hey Noah, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details

Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets

Cool bro I got you. which destination were you lookin to book

Lets run it bro. I'll get you hooked up with our rep perks
Honestly not sure to be exact but id say 25-30+ for sure
We had a dope group from FSU last year y'all def know how to party

I hear you. I know you're getting pressure from your group and that's not a fun spot to be in. Just to be clear again man, there is no U.S. government travel ban in place and Cancun remains at a Level 2 advisory. The airport and resorts are operating as normal. We have travelers out there now perfectly fine. If there were an official prohibition or shutdown, we would not be running trips

Per the agreement accepted at booking, the only reimbursement route is through Travel Insurance. As the Tour Operator we don't directly hold the hotel funds, confirmed reservations are governed by vendor contracts that are already paid for your trips

If your group doesn't feel comfortable traveling, the option available at the moment is switching to Punta Cana at the revised $400 package rate per person. I can help coordinate that if you want to move in that direction

I know this isn't the answer everyone wants, but all I can do is be transparent about what's actually possible. I understand the situation isnt ideal for anyone involved but we can only control what we can control

Your trip is already confirmed, Nates as well. Everything will remain as is regarding the free stay. And yea, we stay in constant contact with our resort partners and on-site staff. They've confirmed everything is operating normally in the hotel zone and tourist areas and with the groups we currently have in Cancun

Our groups stay within the hotel zone areas, and those areas have private security in addition to local authorities. We also monitor U.S. State Department updates daily. If anything were to materially change, we would notify everyone immediately
Totally understand the frustration, all we can do is work with what we have at the moment
